MNEMONIST-ANXIOUS_ATTACHMENT.description:
[gold]Humors[/gold] you generate are [gold]Persistent[/gold].
At the start of combat, add a [gold]Melancholic+[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-ANXIOUS_ATTACHMENT.flavor: Keep your friends close lest the flee.
MNEMONIST-ANXIOUS_ATTACHMENT.title: Anxious Attachment
MNEMONIST-CRANIAL_TRAUMA.description: At the start of combat, add an [gold]Amnensia[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MNEMONIST-CRANIAL_TRAUMA.flavor: All ill-advised method to clear one's mind.
MNEMONIST-CRANIAL_TRAUMA.title: Cranial Trauma
MNEMONIST-FLASH_CARDS.description: Whenever you draw your 10th card in a turn, gain {StrengthPower} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {DexterityPower} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
MNEMONIST-FLASH_CARDS.flavor: Memorizing the various features of the Spire is a matter of life and death.
MNEMONIST-FLASH_CARDS.title: Flash Cards
MNEMONIST-IDYLLIC_MEMORIES.description: At the start of each combat gain [blue]{Memory:diff()}[/blue] [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-IDYLLIC_MEMORIES.flavor: The time before the Spire exists only in fragments, but it is comforting all the same.
MNEMONIST-IDYLLIC_MEMORIES.title: Idyllic Memories
MNEMONIST-NEWTONS_CRADLE.description: Whenever you shuffle your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Psych[/gold] {Humors} and draw a card.
MNEMONIST-NEWTONS_CRADLE.title: Newton's Cradle
MNEMONIST-SPIRE_DIARY.description:
At the start of your second turn, gain [blue]{Memory:diff()}[/blue] [blue]Memory[/blue].
Whenever you Rest, increase this [blue]Memory[/blue] by [blue]{Increase:diff()}[/blue].
MNEMONIST-SPIRE_DIARY.flavor: Paper and pen succeed where grey matter fail.
MNEMONIST-SPIRE_DIARY.title: Spire Diary
MNEMONIST-THERAPY_COUCH.description: Whenever you draw a [gold]Status[/gold] card, deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy.
MNEMONIST-THERAPY_COUCH.title: Therapy Couch
MNEMONIST-TUMULTUOUS_PRESENT.description: At the start of your first {Turns} turns, gain [blue]{Memory:diff()}[/blue] [blue]Memory[/blue].
MNEMONIST-TUMULTUOUS_PRESENT.flavor: These endless torments are fuel, if nothing else.
MNEMONIST-TUMULTUOUS_PRESENT.title: Tumultuous Present
MNEMONIST-UNFORGETTABLE_MOMENT.flavor: His name and purpose have long been forgotten, but this simple memory remains.
MNEMONIST-UNFORGETTABLE_MOMENT.title: Unforgettable Moment
